case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. MIGUEL DE LOS ANGELES ISLAS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-06-2023 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION DUE TO THE CONDITION OF THE COURT CALENDAR TO FEB-24-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2023 - JUDGMENT.

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40) SERVED OCT-27-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ISLAS, MIGUEL DE LOS ANGELES

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-24-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-24-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC, REPRESENTED BY VERONICA ROSALES, ASSISTANT MANAGER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIGUEL DE LOS ANGELES ISLAS IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTS IN COURT FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND ASSISTED BY SPANISH COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER PATRICE BINAISA (#301593). COURT DEEMED PROOF OF SERVICE IS VALID. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ISLAS, MIGUEL DE LOS ANGELES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,640.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
